title: gitops-reverser values
description: Partial schema. Only the values whose shape is load-bearing are constrained here; everything else is free-form until it needs a rule.

create.description: Create the manager ClusterRole and its binding.

watchTypes.description: Which types a WatchRule may read. The reverser never writes to a watched type.

mode.description: any: cluster-wide read on everything, including every Secret. selected: read only the types listed below.

selected.description: Types to grant when mode is selected. Verbs are always get/list/watch.

apiGroups.description: API groups; use [""] for the core group.

selected.description: mode=selected with no entries would leave the reverser able to watch nothing.
